THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVUS, ALLEN AKA ALLEN COLUZZI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 554 BROADWAY #19, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM.NO FURTH STAYS.EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS&ATTY FEES. PLTF WVS RENT&DAMAGES.MUTUAL RELEASE INCL 1542CC.PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED.NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION.DEFT COMPLIES DEF ATTY TO RELEASE $3500 (PD BY PLTF)TO DEFT.
